hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者；【CRYPTO】15 亿美元的加密货币多头被抹去，比特币一度跌破 62,000 美元；【FINANCE】格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
items.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.summary_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一人在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中撰写了美联储章节。

items.title: Bitcoin briefly drops below $62,000 as $1.5 billion in crypto longs get wiped out
items.summary: Presto Research says bitcoin's drawdowns this year have coincided with rallies in AI stocks and gold as markets scale back expectations for Fed rate cuts.
items.title_zh: 15 亿美元的加密货币多头被抹去，比特币一度跌破 62,000 美元
items.summary_zh: Presto Research 表示，比特币今年的下跌恰逢人工智能股票和黄金的上涨，因为市场降低了对美联储降息的预期。

items.title: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
items.summary: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴
items.summary_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司收购房屋建筑商泰勒·莫里森(Taylor Morrison)，使该集团在房地产领域获得了更大的立足点，而且估值似乎很便宜。

items.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
items.summary: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.
items.title_zh: 如果真主党停止袭击，以色列和黎巴嫩同意实施停火
items.summary_zh: 美国表示，两国拒绝“任何国家或非国家行为者企图将黎巴嫩的未来作为人质”。

items.title: Israel and Lebanon Agree to Renew Cease-Fire
items.summary: The U.S.-brokered agreement called for “a complete cessation” of fire from Hezbollah, an Iranian-backed militia that operates in southern Lebanon. A previous cease-fire has largely been ignored.
items.title_zh: 以色列和黎巴嫩同意延长停火
items.summary_zh: 美国斡旋的协议要求真主党“完全停止”火力，真主党是伊朗支持的民兵组织，在黎巴嫩南部活动。之前的停火协议基本上被忽视了。

items.title: Amid War, Iran’s Soccer Leader Works to Get His Team to the World Cup
items.summary: Mehdi Taj said his federation has been dealing with FIFA, not the United States, in trying to obtain visas for Iran to play in the tournament that begins next week.
items.title_zh: 在战争中，伊朗足球领袖努力让他的球队进入世界杯
items.summary_zh: 迈赫迪·泰吉表示，他的足协一直在与国际足联（而不是美国）打交道，试图为伊朗获得参加下周开始的世界杯的签证。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Russia Launches Deadly Strikes on Kyiv After Threatening Ukraine for a Week
items.summary: Moscow’s repeated warnings of a major strike, combined with the delay before it happened, seemed intended to inflict a psychological toll on the Ukrainian capital.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在威胁乌克兰一周后对基辅发动致命袭击
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科一再发出重大罢工的警告，再加上罢工发生前的拖延，似乎是为了给乌克兰首都造成心理打击。

items.title: Polymarket says No for May, Yes for June after Strategy's recent bitcoin sale
items.summary: UMA voters ruled that Strategy's June 1 disclosure counted for the June contract, even though the company said it sold bitcoin during the final week of May.
items.title_zh: 在Strategy最近出售比特币后，Polymarket表示五月不会，六月会
items.summary_zh: UMA 选民裁定 Strategy 6 月 1 日的披露计入 6 月合约，尽管该公司表示在 5 月最后一周出售了比特币。

items.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine borrows a page from Saylor's playbook to offer 9.5% yield in preferred stocks
items.summary: The largest Ethereum treasury firm is taking a page from Michael Saylor's Strategy to issue preferred shares to tap new sources of funding.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 借鉴了 Saylor 的做法，提供 9.5% 的优先股收益率
items.summary_zh: 最大的以太坊财务公司正在效仿 Michael Saylor 的策略，发行优先股以开发新的资金来源。

items.title: Polymarket’s UMA vote upholds ‘No’ outcome on Strategy bitcoin sale market despite backlash
items.summary: The dispute centers on Strategy's disclosure that it sold 32 BTC for roughly $2.5 million between May 26 and May 31.
items.title_zh: 尽管遭到强烈反对，Polymarket 的 UMA 对战略比特币销售市场的投票仍维持“否”结果
items.summary_zh: 争议的焦点是Strategy披露，它在5月26日至5月31日期间以约250万美元的价格出售了32个比特币。

items.title: Bessent backs summer push for Clarity Act, says bitcoin reserve moving at ‘deliberate speed’
items.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the department is moving at a "deliberate speed" to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve.
items.title_zh: 贝森特支持夏季推动《澄清法案》，称比特币储备以“审慎的速度”移动
items.summary_zh: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，该部门正在以“审慎的速度”建立比特币战略储备。

items.title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利即将向人工智能代理开放万亿美元财富管理渠道
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利的举动是华尔街主要银行向外部人工智能工具开放其平台的最早实例之一。

items.title: US House delivers rebuke to Trump as it votes to halt Iran war
items.summary: In the 215-208 vote, four Republicans joined Democrats to pass the measure, which is largely symbolic.
items.title_zh: 美国众议院投票停止伊朗战争，谴责特朗普
items.summary_zh: 在 215 票对 208 票中，四名共和党人与民主党人一起通过了这项法案，这在很大程度上具有象征意义。

items.title: China bans four New Zealand MPs over Taiwan visit
items.summary: Upon their return from Taiwan last month, the lawmakers were told that China had banned them for a year.
items.title_zh: 中国禁止四名新西兰议员访问台湾
items.summary_zh: 上个月从台湾回来后，议员们被告知中国已禁止他们一年。

items.title: For Dubai’s Migrants, War Is One More Worry in Super Stressed Lives
items.summary: For laborers in Dubai, a free stress-management class offers a temporary oasis of calm amid struggles with debt, loneliness, long hours and, in recent months, the fear of missile strikes.
items.title_zh: 对于迪拜的移民来说，战争是他们生活压力巨大的又一担忧
items.summary_zh: 对于迪拜的劳工来说，免费的压力管理课程为他们在与债务、孤独、长时间工作以及最近几个月对导弹袭击的恐惧作斗争时提供了暂时的平静绿洲。

items.title: Cardano slumps under 20 cents as Hoskinson says he is 'taking a break' after warning of ecosystem failures
items.summary: Hoskinson's remarks followed a string of setbacks for the ecosystem, including the cancellation of Cardano's flagship conference and the shutdown of a prominent analytics platform.
items.title_zh: 霍斯金森在警告生态系统失败后表示正在“休息”，卡尔达诺股价跌至 20 美分以下
items.summary_zh: 霍斯金森的言论是在该生态系统遭遇一系列挫折之后​​发表的，其中包括卡尔达诺旗舰会议的取消和一个著名分析平台的关闭。

items.title: BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP ETFs bleed $4.4 billion over 13 sessions, only HYPE in green
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT shed another $342 million on Wednesday as ether, solana and XRP funds joined the redemption wave, leaving Hyperliquid's HYPE products as the only major crypto ETF category still pulling in net new money.
items.title_zh: BTC、ETH、SOL 和 XRP ETF 在 13 个交易日内损失了 44 亿美元，只有 HYPE 呈绿色
items.summary_zh: 随着以太坊、solana 和 XRP 基金加入赎回浪潮，贝莱德的 IBIT 周三又损失了 3.42 亿美元，使得 Hyperliquid 的 HYPE 产品成为唯一仍在吸引净新资金的主要加密 ETF 类别。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bonk (BONK)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #117.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bonk (BONK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 117 名。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #116.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 116 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Worldcoin (WLD)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #47.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：世界币（WLD）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 47。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Cardano (ADA)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #16.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：卡尔达诺（ADA）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 16。

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
items.title_zh: 前沿人工智能民主治理蓝图
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 勾勒出美国前沿人工智能治理的蓝图，提出了安全、弹性和国家安全的联邦框架。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
items.summary: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.
items.title_zh: 交易员预测，在最近的抛售之后，比特币将在 2026 年跌至新低
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Kalshi 的交易员认为，加密货币可能会跌破 2 月初触及的低点。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin selloff stalls as key indicator signals oversold conditions
items.summary: Bitcoin rebounded to $64,000 after a sharp selloff, with the move reflecting a typical bounce from oversold conditions rather than a confirmed trend reversal.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：关键指标表明超卖状况，比特币抛售停滞
items.summary_zh: 比特币在大幅抛售后反弹至 64,000 美元，这一举动反映了超卖条件下的典型反弹，而不是确认的趋势逆转。

items.title: Bitcoin tanks below $63,000 for the first time since February as price selloff deepens
items.summary: The selloff has triggered demand for protective options plays, pushing the fear gauge higher.
items.title_zh: 随着价格抛售加深，比特币自 2 月份以来首次跌破 63,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 抛售引发了对保护性期权的需求，推高了恐惧指数。

items.title: SpaceX targets record $75 billion IPO as bitcoin treasury and liquidity risks draw focus
items.summary: SpaceX's proposed $75 billion IPO would rank among the largest ever, while its $1.29 billion bitcoin holding and the broader wave of megacap listings could reshape capital flows across crypto and technology markets.
items.title_zh: 比特币金库和流动性风险成为焦点 SpaceX目标IPO规模创纪录750亿美元
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 拟议的 750 亿美元 IPO 将跻身有史以来规模最大的 IPO，而其 12.9 亿美元的比特币持有量和更广泛的大型股上市浪潮可能会重塑加密货币和技术市场的资本流动。

items.title: Bitmine to launch STRC-style preferred stock offering amid $9.2 billion unrealized ETH losses
items.summary: The company plans to use the net proceeds for general purposes, which may include purchasing additional ETH and expanding staking operations.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 将推出 STRC 式优先股发行，未实现 ETH 损失达 92 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司计划将净收益用于一般用途，其中可能包括购买额外的 ETH 和扩大质押业务。

items.title: EdgeX offers refunds and launches 200,000 USDC bounty after 71% token flash crash
items.summary: EdgeX says that 174 addresses flooded a PancakeSwap pool with EDGE token sell orders during a period of low liquidity.
items.title_zh: 71% 代币闪崩后，EdgeX 提供退款并启动 200,000 USDC 赏金
items.summary_zh: EdgeX 表示，在流动性较低的时期，174 个地址充斥着 PancakeSwap 池中的 EDGE 代币卖出订单。

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
items.title_zh: 向 GPT-Rosalind 引入新功能
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 通过增强的生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流程功能推进生命科学研究。

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
items.title_zh: Codex 正在成为每个人的生产力工具
items.summary_zh: 知识工作的下一个时代报告探讨了 Codex 如何通过人工智能驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流程自动化和内容创建来改变生产力。

items.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
items.title_zh: Mellum2 简介：JetBrains 的 12B 专家混合模型

items.title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
items.title_zh: 欢迎 NVIDIA Cosmos 3：首个用于物理 AI 推理和行动的开放式全模型

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile LA mayoral race
items.summary: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.
items.title_zh: 交易员称凯伦·巴斯和斯宾塞·普拉特将在备受瞩目的洛杉矶市长竞选中晋级决选
items.summary_zh: 洛杉矶选民周二前往投票站。如果没有候选人获得超过 50%，得票最多的两名候选人将进入 11 月的决选。

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
items.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门表示，随着人工智能公司寻求数十亿美元的投资，市场处于“贪婪”模式
items.summary_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门发表此番言论之际，投资者正在为多年来股票发行最繁忙的时期之一做准备。

items.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
items.summary: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场推动华尔街采用，Polymarket 完成首笔大宗交易
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台越来越多地将机构交易者而非个人交易者视为下一个增长场所。

items.title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
items.summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.
items.title_zh: 个体交易员推动了卡尔希的上涨。现在，它正走向华尔街
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的一系列举措中，美国预测市场平台正在努力使其事件合约对机构交易更具吸引力。

items.title: Rubio odds for GOP 2028 nominee close to overtaking Vance on Kalshi
items.summary: Vice President Vance has seen his odds slip since the start of the year, as the secretary of State's chances have been buoyed by international conflicts.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥获得共和党 2028 年提名的可能性接近超越万斯
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，副总统万斯的胜算一直在下降，因为国际冲突增加了国务卿的机会。

items.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
items.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.
items.title_zh: “要么颠覆，要么消亡”：人工智能正在摧毁 ChatGPT 之前建立的一代初创公司
items.summary_zh: 人工智能热潮为 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 注入了超过 2500 亿美元，这使得在 2022 年 ChatGPT 到来之前建立的数百家初创公司陷入困境。

items.title: 'Crazy' phone call between Trump and Netanyahu complicates Iran talks
items.summary: Israel's PM laughed off reports of friction, but he has tested the patience of other US presidents.
items.title_zh: 特朗普和内塔尼亚胡之间的“疯狂”电话使伊朗谈判变得复杂
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理对有关摩擦的报道一笑置之，但他却考验了其他美国总统的耐心。

items.title: Grab what you can while you can: The new reality in the South China Sea
items.summary: After years of watching China create land to back its expansive claims, others are doing the same.
items.title_zh: 尽你所能：南海的新现实
items.summary_zh: 在多年来目睹中国创造土地以支持其扩张的领土主张之后，其他国家也在做同样的事情。

items.title: Ukraine accused of killing four in occupied Crimea
items.summary: At least 10 people have been injured in the attacks, according to Russian-backed officials.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰被指控在被占领的克里米亚杀害四人
items.summary_zh: 据俄罗斯支持的官员称，至少有 10 人在袭击中受伤。

items.title: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
items.summary: Iran says the attack on Kuwait was in retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island.
items.title_zh: 伊朗无人机袭击科威特机场造成1人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 伊朗表示，对科威特的袭击是对美国早些时候袭击伊朗油轮和岛屿的报复。

items.title: Heavy gunfire in Somali capital as row over election delay escalates
items.summary: The opposition has called for protests after the president's term in office was extended by a year.
items.title_zh: 选举推迟争议升级，索马里首都发生激烈枪战
items.summary_zh: 总统任期延长一年后，反对派呼吁举行抗议活动。

items.title: Trump to nominate Blanche for attorney general on permanent basis
items.summary: If confirmed by the Senate, Trump's former personal lawyer would become the administration's number one prosecutor.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将提名布兰奇永久担任司法部长
items.summary_zh: 如果得到参议院的批准，特朗普的前私人律师将成为政府的第一号检察官。

items.title: Germany blames Russia for 'bitter defeat' in UN Security Council bid
items.summary: Johann Wadephul said it was "no secret" Russia had stirred up sentiment against Germany over its support for Ukraine.
items.title_zh: 德国指责俄罗斯在联合国安理会申办中“惨败”
items.summary_zh: 约翰·瓦德菲尔表示，俄罗斯因德国支持乌克兰而煽动针对德国的情绪，这“不是什么秘密”。

items.title: South Korea’s Governing Democratic Party Sweeps Local Elections but Faces Setback in Seoul Mayor’s Race
items.summary: President Lee Jae Myung’s Democratic Party had hoped to consolidate its influence and extend his political momentum.
items.title_zh: 韩国执政民主党横扫地方选举但首尔市长竞选遭遇挫折
items.summary_zh: 李在明总统领导的民主党曾希望巩固自己的影响力并扩大其政治势头。

items.title: Ukraine Strikes St. Petersburg on First Day of a Marquee Putin Event
items.summary: As an annual economic conference was set to begin, President Volodymyr Zelensky said Ukraine had targeted a navy base and an oil terminal in the region that includes Russia’s second-largest city.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在普京大型活动的第一天袭击了圣彼得堡
items.summary_zh: 在年度经济会议即将开始之际，总统泽伦斯基表示，乌克兰的目标是该地区的一个海军基地和一个石油码头，该地区包括俄罗斯第二大城市。

items.title: Protests in UK Over Henry Nowak Murder Case Turn Violent, as Leaders Urge Calm
items.summary: Eleven officers were wounded in clashes with demonstrators after right-wing politicians and commentators accused the police of anti-white bias.
items.title_zh: 英国对亨利·诺瓦克谋杀案的抗议活动变得暴力，领导人敦促保持冷静
items.summary_zh: 右翼政界人士和评论员指责警方存在反白人偏见，导致 11 名警察在与示威者的冲突中受伤。

items.title: Fire at a New Delhi Hotel Kills at Least 21
items.summary: Dozens more were injured, the authorities said. The blaze appears to be the deadliest in the Indian capital in at least four years.
items.title_zh: 新德里一家酒店发生火灾，造成至少 21 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 当局称，还有数十人受伤。这场火灾似乎是印度首都至少四年来最严重的火灾。

items.title: Navy Helicopter Crash Kills Three in Britain
items.summary: The helicopter was on a training exercise when it crashed in a field in southwestern England.
items.title_zh: 英国海军直升机坠毁造成三人死亡
items.summary_zh: 这架直升机当时正在进行训练演习，在英格兰西南部的一个田野里坠毁。

items.title: The New Zealand Parakeet Pair That Are Saving Their Species
items.summary: There are about 450 orange-fronted parakeets left in the world. Super breeders Nacho and Trixie are doing their best to bolster the population.
items.title_zh: 新西兰鹦鹉对正在拯救自己的物种
items.summary_zh: 世界上仅存约 450 只橙额鹦鹉。超级饲养员纳乔和特里克西正在尽最大努力增加种群数量。

items.title: Goldman Sachs teams with Apex, Archax for tokenized real estate fund
items.summary: The fund combines blockchain native issuance with established fund structures.
items.title_zh: 高盛与 Apex、Archax 合作开发代币化房地产基金
items.summary_zh: 该基金将区块链原生发行与既定基金结构相结合。

items.title: Apyx's STRC collateralized stablecoin suffers a brief depeg. Protocol says its a feature, not bug
items.summary: Apyx’s apxUSD stablecoin briefly slipped to 93 cents Wednesday.
items.title_zh: Apyx 的 STRC 抵押稳定币经历了短暂的脱钩。协议说它是一个功能，而不是错误
items.summary_zh: Apyx 的 apxUSD 稳定币周三短暂跌至 93 美分。

items.title: Arthur Hayes sells entire HYPE and NEAR positions, citing AI IPOs and US midterms
items.summary: Hayes faced backlash from social media users after selling the tokens days after publicly touting them.
items.title_zh: Arthur Hayes 以人工智能 IPO 和美国中期选举为由出售全部 HYPE 和 NEAR 头寸
items.summary_zh: 海耶斯在公开宣传这些代币几天后出售这些代币，遭到了社交媒体用户的强烈反对。

items.title: Coinbase, SpaceX, Meta join DOJ anti-scam operation that froze $3.8 million in crypto
items.summary: Private-sector firms joined the DOJ's "Disruption Week," freezing $3.8 million in crypto and disrupting 1.4 million scam-linked accounts.
items.title_zh: Coinbase、SpaceX、Meta 加入 DOJ 反诈骗行动，冻结了 380 万美元的加密货币
items.summary_zh: 私营部门公司加入了司法部的“破坏周”，冻结了 380 万美元的加密货币，并破坏了 140 万个与诈骗相关的账户。

items.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE overtakes Solana in price as SOL falls to lowest levels since 2023
items.summary: Hyperliquid's market capitalization has climbed to over $16 billion, but still well behind Solana's $42 billion.
items.title_zh: 随着 SOL 跌至 2023 年以来的最低水平，Hyperliquid 的 HYPE 价格超过 Solana
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 的市值已攀升至 160 亿美元以上，但仍远远落后于 Solana 的 420 亿美元。

items.title: Crypto VC deal count slumps to five-year low as investors grow more selective
items.summary: Monthly venture deal count in crypto fell to roughly 50 deals in May, a level not seen since before 2021.
items.title_zh: 随着投资者变得更加挑剔，加密货币风险投资交易数量跌至五年低点
items.summary_zh: 5 月份，加密货币领域的月度风险交易数量降至约 50 笔，这是 2021 年以来的最高水平。

items.title: Hyperliquid hits record share of global perps market as HIP-3 tops $62 billion monthly volume
items.summary: Despite the bullish sentiment on HIP-3, Hyperliquid's pure crypto volumes are down significantly year over year.
items.title_zh: 随着 HIP-3 月交易量突破 620 亿美元，Hyperliquid 在全球永续产品市场中的份额创历史新高
items.summary_zh: 尽管 HIP-3 的情绪看涨，但 Hyperliquid 的纯加密货币交易量同比大幅下降。

items.title: Solayer rolls out Solana-native onchain perps trading platform Margin Trade mainnet
items.summary: Margin Trade enables trading of crypto, commodities, and equities via a single margin account on Solana, tapping the SVM chain Solayer.
items.title_zh: Solayer 推出 Solana 原生链上永续交易平台 Margin Trade 主网
items.summary_zh: 保证金交易允许通过 Solana 上的单一保证金账户利用 SVM 链 Solayer 进行加密货币、商品和股票交易。

items.title: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
items.summary: See how Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build a Node.js runtime for the edge, accelerating development 10x to 20x and shipping in weeks instead of months.
items.title_zh: Wasmer 如何使用 Codex 为边缘构建 Node.js 运行时
items.summary_zh: 了解 Wasmer 如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 为边缘构建 Node.js 运行时，将开发速度提高 10 倍到 20 倍，并在几周而不是几个月内交付。

items.title: OpenAI public policy agenda
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 公共政策议程
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了其人工智能公共政策议程，包括安全、青年保护、劳动力转型和全球标准，以确保人工智能造福社会。

items.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
items.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.
items.title_zh: Travelers 通过 OpenAI 在全国范围内部署人工智能支持的索赔
items.summary_zh: Travelers 使用 OpenAI 构建了一个由人工智能驱动的索赔助理，以指导客户提交索赔、提供 24/7 支持并在需求高峰期间扩展运营。

items.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.summary: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.
items.title_zh: 适用于每个角色、工具和工作流程的 Codex
items.summary_zh: 发现新的 Codex 插件、网站和注释，帮助分析师、营销人员、设计师、投资者和其他团队利用 AI 完成更多工作。

items.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
items.summary: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.
items.title_zh: 通过全球领导力促进青年安全和机会
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 呼吁针对青年人工智能安全采取全球行动，提议成立一个国际机构来加强对年轻人的保障、标准和机会。

items.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.summary: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能政策和政治倡导的看法
items.summary_zh: 我们对人工智能政策和政治宣传的态度、透明度、对深思熟虑的监管和人工智能安全的支持，并且没有外部政治团体代表公司发言。

items.title_zh: 超越聊天机器人的直接偏好优化

items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 1 部分）：torch.profiler 初学者指南

items.title_zh: Reachy Mini 完全本土化

items.title_zh: 值得正确使用的工具、脚手架和人工智能代理术语

items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.

items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.

items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

items.summary_zh: 观看 9 个视频，展示 Google I/O 2026 上宣布的 Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的功能。

items.summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.

items.summary_zh: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了像手语导师这样的人工智能原型，以重塑教育和工作的未来。

items.summary: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.

items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: Tod Machover receives George Peabody Medal for contributions to music and technology
items.summary: The George Peabody Medal is the highest honor bestowed by the Peabody Institute of the Johns Hopkins University.
items.title_zh: 托德·马乔弗因对音乐和技术的贡献而荣获乔治·皮博迪奖章
items.summary_zh: 乔治·皮博迪奖章是约翰·霍普金斯大学皮博迪研究所授予的最高荣誉。

items.title: Media Advisory: MIT to establish regional quantum hub
items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院获得马萨诸塞州联邦投资 2500 万美元，用于建造一个新的共享设施，作为全州范围内的量子工具箱。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育项目首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。
